items.title: David hat trick leads Canada to historic WC rout
items.summary: Jonathan David's hat trick propelled Canada to a historic 6-0 rout of Qatar in Vancouver on Thursday to go top of their World Cup group.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Simpson improving after collapsing at track event
items.summary: Olympic 1,500-meter bronze medalist and world champion Jenny Simpson remains under medical care Thursday but shows "encouraging improvement" after collapsing while pacing a mile...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: What happened in Aurora? Kieffer Alas, Sam Reyes p...
items.summary: Blue Eagles players Kieffer Alas and Sam Reyes have provided a detailed public account of what happened at the team's ill-fated team-building camp.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
